title: Diploma Jobs 2026 – Junior Engineer
shortInfo: East Coast Railway Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Junior Engineer (TRD). Candidates with Diploma, B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through East Coast Railway official website rrcbbs.org.in.

basic_details.job_title: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: East Coast Railway Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Junior Engineer (TRD). Candidates with Diploma, B.E/B.Tech Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 10-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through East Coast Railway official website rrcbbs.org.in.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age: 47 years Age Relaxation: ST: 52 years

age_limit.details: Candidates should download and read the East Coast Railway Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering including sub stream branches, ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, 10+2 in Science Stream
qualification.details: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering or ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass or 10+2 in Science Stream.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://rrcbbbs.org.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (TRD) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (TRD) posts is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authorities by this date.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer (TRD) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, or ITI/ACT Apprenticeship Pass, or have completed 10+2 in Science Stream to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Junior Engineer (TRD) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Engineer (TRD) post is 47 years. Age relaxation is applicable for ST candidates, who can apply up to 52 years.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer (TRD) role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be placed in Pay Matrix Level-6 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) recommendations, offering a competitive salary.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer (TRD) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Junior Engineer (TRD) position in the East Coast Railway recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the Junior Engineer (TRD) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What are the stages in the selection process?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Examination (CBT/TBT Mode), Scrutiny of Service Record & last three years APARs, followed by the final Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of East Coast Railway, which is https://rrcbbbs.org.in.

faq.question: What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located in Jatni, Odisha, with the pincode 752050.

seo_tags: East Coast Railway Junior Engineer (TRD) Recruitment 2026
